tweet_text: 🚨 Manchester United defeat Aston Villa 2-1, with Matheus Cunha scoring the winner! Bruno Fernandes records his 100th assist for the club, showcasing his playmaking brilliance. 🔥⚽ #MUFC #PL

article_title: European football: Raphinha hat-trick seals Barcelona win, Como sink Roma
